Ford v. Ferrari (2019)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $117,624,357Details
International Box Office $106,766,349
Worldwide Box Office $224,390,706
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $9,249,890
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $10,845,109
Total $20,094,999
Further financial details...

Synopsis

An eccentric, determined team of American engineers and designers, led by automotive visionary Carroll Shelby and his British driver, Ken Miles, are dispatched by Henry Ford II with the mission of building from scratch an entirely new race car with the potential to finally defeat the perennially dominant Ferrari at the 1966 Le Mans World Championship.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$31,474,958 (26.8% of total gross)
Legs:3.74 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:52.4% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$97,600,000 (worldwide box office is 2.3 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,528 opening theaters/3,746 max. theaters, 6.7 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $153,549,739

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: November 15th, 2019 (Wide) by 20th Century Fox
November 15th, 2019 (IMAX) by 20th Century Fox
International Releases: November 14th, 2019 (Wide) (France)
November 14th, 2019 (Wide), released as Le Mans '66 - La grande sfida (Italy)
November 14th, 2019 (Wide) (New Zealand)
November 15th, 2019 (Wide), released as Ford против Ferrari (Russia (CIS))
November 15th, 2019 (Wide), released as IZZIVALCA (Slovenia)
Video Release: January 28th, 2020 by Fox Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for some language and peril.
(Rating bulletin 2597 (Cert #51967), 9/25/2019)
Running Time: 152 minutes
Award nomination: 2020 Oscars Best Picture Nominee
Cast, crew, or production detail: Voiceover/Narration
Film format: IMAX: DMR
Geographical setting: France
Plot point: Auto Racing, Death of a Colleague, Death of a Spouse or Fiancée / Fiancé, Professional Rivalry, Young Child Dealing with the Death of a Parent
Subgenre: Sports Drama
Time period setting: 1960s
Source:Based on Factual Book/Article
Genre:Drama
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Dramatization
Production/Financing Companies: Chernin Entertainment, 20th Century Fox, TSG Entertainment, Turnpike Films
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

An eccentric, determined team of American engineers and designers, led by automotive visionary Carroll Shelby and his British driver, Ken Miles, are dispatched by Henry Ford II with the mission of building from scratch an entirely new race car with the potential to finally defeat the perennially dominant Ferrari at the 1966 Le Mans World Championship.
